ai_output.post_caption: Bitcoin ETF inflows hit a record $500M in a single session as institutional demand accelerates. BTC briefly touched the $50K level before settling at $49,400. Ethereum ETFs also recorded their second-best inflow day since approval, signalling broad institutional appetite across the crypto market.
